message:
🐛 Sync demo mode detection with auth demo-token (#308)

The UI demo mode flag (kc-demo-mode) and the auth demo-token were
independent. When auth auto-set demo-token (backend unavailable),
CardWrapper never showed the Demo badge or yellow border because
useDemoMode() only checked kc-demo-mode localStorage flag.

Now the initialization also checks for token === 'demo-token',
so all cards correctly show Demo indicators when serving demo data.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
